description: The 13.3 build has been stabilized: packages are now published at version 13.3.0 without a preview suffix. The four packages with SuppressFinalPackageVersion=true (Aspire.Azure.AI.OpenAI, Aspire.Hosting.Keycloak, Aspire.Keycloak.Authentication, Aspire.Milvus.Client) continue to ship as prerelease.
name: 13.3.0 release build stabilized
